# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

Do not disclose suspected vulnerabilities, credentials, or exploit details in a public issue.

Report them privately through [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/Quigleybits/custom_claude_skills/security/advisories/new). Include the affected file or package version, impact, reproduction steps, and any suggested mitigation. Sensitive reports will be acknowledged and assessed before public disclosure.

## Supported versions

Security fixes target the current `master` branch and the latest published npm version. Older npm releases should be upgraded after a fixed release is available.
